title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ABB India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ABB India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? ABB India International Enterprises in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India International Enterprises:
ABB India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India International Enterprises!
